title: filago pyramidata var. atlantica
intro: Filago pyramidata var. atlantica, also known as lesser clematis or Atlantic clematis, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is commonly found in coastal areas and dry sandy soils. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Filago pyramidata var. atlantica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
